themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "The Valley of Eshcol (meaning 'cluster') near Hebron was renowned for its vineyards. Archaeol...". Word-study detail reinforces "יוֹשֵׁ֣ב: dwell - properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by impl...".
